description: Final provenance: Fe(II) triad conservation comparison and GO annotation conflict diagram
code:
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import numpy as np

# Create a comprehensive summary figure of all computational evidence
fig, axes = plt.subplots(1, 2, figsize=(16, 7))

# === Left: Fe(II) triad comparison bar chart ===
ax = axes[0]
ax.set_title('Fe(II) Catalytic Triad Conservation\nAcross JHDM1/KDM2 Family', fontsize=12, fontweight='bold')

proteins = ['KDM2A\n(Human)', 'Jhd1\n(S. cerevisiae)', 'Epe1\n(S. pombe)', 'PHF2\n(Human)']
# Score: 1 = canonical, 0.5 = conservative change, 0 = non-conservative
scores = {
    'Ligand 1\n(His)':   [1.0, 1.0, 1.0, 1.0],   # All have His
    'Ligand 2\n(Asp/Glu)': [1.0, 1.0, 0.7, 1.0],   # Epe1 has Glu (conservative)
    'Ligand 3\n(His)':   [1.0, 1.0, 0.0, 0.0],   # Epe1 and PHF2 have Tyr
}

x = np.arange(len(proteins))
width = 0.25
colors_lig = ['#4CAF50', '#2196F3', '#F44336']

for i, (lig_name, vals) in enumerate(scores.items()):
    bar_colors = ['#4CAF50' if v >= 0.7 else '#FFC107' if v >= 0.3 else '#F44336' for v in vals]
    bars = ax.bar(x + i*width - width, vals, width, label=lig_name, color=bar_colors,
                  edgecolor='black', linewidth=0.5)
    
    # Add residue labels
    residue_labels = [
        ['H212', 'H305', 'H297', 'H249'],   # Lig 1
        ['D214', 'D307', 'E299', 'D251'],   # Lig 2  
        ['H284', 'H377', 'Y370', 'Y321'],   # Lig 3
    ]
    for j, (bar, label) in enumerate(zip(bars, residue_labels[i])):
        ax.text(bar.get_x() + bar.get_width()/2., bar.get_height() + 0.03,
                label, ha='center', va='bottom', fontsize=8, fontweight='bold',
                color='red' if vals[j] < 0.3 else 'black')

ax.set_xticks(x)
ax.set_xticklabels(proteins, fontsize=10)
ax.set_ylabel('Conservation Score', fontsize=11)
ax.set_ylim(0, 1.3)
ax.legend(fontsize=9, loc='upper right')

# Add active/inactive labels
for i, prot in enumerate(proteins):
    active = 'ACTIVE' if i < 2 else 'INACTIVE'
    color = 'green' if i < 2 else 'red'
    ax.text(i, -0.15, active, ha='center', fontweight='bold', fontsize=9, color=color)

# === Right: Annotation conflict diagram ===
ax2 = axes[1]
ax2.set_title('GO Annotation Hierarchy & Conflict', fontsize=12, fontweight='bold')
ax2.set_xlim(0, 10)
ax2.set_ylim(0, 10)

# GO terms as boxes
import matplotlib.patches as mpatches

# Parent: GO:0032452
box1 = mpatches.FancyBboxPatch((2.5, 7.5), 5, 1.5, boxstyle="round,pad=0.2",
                                 facecolor='#FFCCCC', edgecolor='red', linewidth=2)
ax2.add_patch(box1)
ax2.text(5, 8.5, 'GO:0032452', ha='center', va='center', fontsize=10, fontweight='bold')
ax2.text(5, 8.0, 'histone demethylase activity', ha='center', va='center', fontsize=8)

# Annotation label for parent
ax2.text(8.5, 8.3, 'IBA: enables', fontsize=9, color='red', fontweight='bold',
         bbox=dict(boxstyle='round', facecolor='#FFCCCC'))

# Child: GO:0141052  
box2 = mpatches.FancyBboxPatch((2.5, 4.0), 5, 1.5, boxstyle="round,pad=0.2",
                                 facecolor='#CCFFCC', edgecolor='green', linewidth=2)
ax2.add_patch(box2)
ax2.text(5, 5.0, 'GO:0141052', ha='center', va='center', fontsize=10, fontweight='bold')
ax2.text(5, 4.5, 'histone H3 demethylase activity', ha='center', va='center', fontsize=8)

# Annotation label for child
ax2.text(8.5, 4.8, 'IDA: NOT enables', fontsize=9, color='green', fontweight='bold',
         bbox=dict(boxstyle='round', facecolor='#CCFFCC'))

# Arrow from parent to child (is_a)
ax2.annotate('', xy=(5, 5.5), xytext=(5, 7.5),
            arrowprops=dict(arrowstyle='->', color='gray', lw=2))
ax2.text(5.5, 6.5, 'is_a', fontsize=9, color='gray', fontstyle='italic')

# Grandchild: GO:0032454
box3 = mpatches.FancyBboxPatch((2.5, 1.0), 5, 1.5, boxstyle="round,pad=0.2",
                                 facecolor='#E8E8E8', edgecolor='gray', linewidth=1)
ax2.add_patch(box3)
ax2.text(5, 2.0, 'GO:0032454', ha='center', va='center', fontsize=10, fontweight='bold')
ax2.text(5, 1.5, 'histone H3K9 demethylase activity', ha='center', va='center', fontsize=8)

# Annotation label for grandchild
ax2.text(8.5, 1.8, 'UniProt: IDA?\n(absent from\nQuickGO)', fontsize=8, color='gray',
         bbox=dict(boxstyle='round', facecolor='#F0F0F0'))

ax2.annotate('', xy=(5, 2.5), xytext=(5, 4.0),
            arrowprops=dict(arrowstyle='->', color='gray', lw=2))
ax2.text(5.5, 3.2, 'is_a', fontsize=9, color='gray', fontstyle='italic')

# Conflict indicator
ax2.annotate('CONFLICT!\nIBA positive (parent)\nvs IDA negative (child)', 
            xy=(1.5, 6.5), fontsize=10, color='red', fontweight='bold',
            ha='center',
            bbox=dict(boxstyle='round,pad=0.4', facecolor='lightyellow', edgecolor='red', linewidth=2))

ax2.axis('off')

plt.tight_layout()
plt.savefig('/tmp/epe1_final_provenance.png', dpi=150, bbox_inches='tight')
plt.show()
print("Final provenance figure saved.")
